subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan and Zia Bagdadi, spoken on 1912-06-20
subcodes.first_line: Mirza Hadi Javaheri, a very wealthy Persian Bahá'í died in Baghdad leaving a son, three daughter and a great fortune.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @business; financial; property matters, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @personal instructions
